cost_name: Civil & Construction — PEM Brownfield (Existing Industrial Site) — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: CS-CIV-001 (greenfield PEM) with brownfield discount (−30%). HGHH/Moorburg model: reused existing buildings, roads, drainage. Normand'Hy: Port-Jérôme brownfield — similar advantage.

confidence.rationale: Brownfield civil cost savings of 25-35% are well-documented in industrial projects. HGHH provides qualitative validation. Range accounts for site condition variability (contamination remediation may offset savings).

primary_drivers: Reuse of existing foundations, roads, drainage
Existing buildings adaptable to electrolyzer hall
exclusions: Grid connection — see separate CS-ELI-002 for brownfield electrical

sources.title: HGHH (GA-PR-004) — Moorburg coal plant brownfield repurposing
sources.author: Luxcara / HEnW
